title: NGE Artbook Recommendations
wikitext:
[]: NGE Artbook Recommendations?             Quote Post by Orgeston » Fri Jan 01, 2016 1:01 am I'm interested in getting one or two art books, and I was wondering which is the best and where I should get them. I'm most interested in pictures of EVA, and pictures from the rebuild are not a requirement.

[]: Re: NGE Artbook Recommendations?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Jan 01, 2016 4:43 am The Concept Works "Sore wo Nasumono" book is pretty great if you want pictures of Evas. It has a few pics of Unit 01 and a ton of concept designs and drafts for the Evas. You wouldn't go wrong with "Evangelion Chronicle Illustrations" either. There's a Japanese revised edition that has some extra content the English version doesn't have.

[]: Re: NGE Artbook Recommendations?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Jan 01, 2016 5:01 am There's also the 100% Newtype Collection , though a good part of that is black and white drawings.

[]: Re: NGE Artbook Recommendations?             Quote Post by Orgeston » Fri Jan 01, 2016 5:14 pm Alright, thanks! I got the 100% Newtype Collection, since that was the cheapest I could find immediately, and I'll look around for the other two.

[]: Re: NGE Artbook Recommendations?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Jan 01, 2016 6:42 pm That's a great choice! Newtype 100% has a little bit of everything. You really can't go wrong with it!

[]: Re: NGE Artbook Recommendations?             Quote Post by Orgeston » Fri Jan 01, 2016 7:21 pm Yeah, that's what it looked like. I'm pretty interested to look through it. I like to pause NGE when the camera's up close to the EVAs so I can look at all the details, and I've been wanting a source that has all of the details at once. After reading about what the other books have, though, I'll certainly still have to get "Sore wo Nasumono" for the crazy concepts and "Chronicle Illustrations" since it seems so extensive.

[]: Re: NGE Artbook Recommendations?             Quote Post by cyharding » Fri Jan 01, 2016 11:36 pm If you want any other books, I recommend that you check out a thread created by Literary Eagle ( here it is ). She has over 100 books in her collection ranging from the common to a bit on the rare side. The first post has a link to every review she has done (and she's far from being done) so far on her tumbler page. The reviews themselves are well written and she provides pictures of some of the illustrations. Check it out.

[]: Re: NGE Artbook Recommendations?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Jan 02, 2016 3:36 am If you want art books, Der Mond, Die Sterne, and NGE Chronicle Illustrations are going to be your gold standards for comparison. There are other fine choices, depending on your specific wants and needs, but those are gonna be your go-to books for general artwork purposes.

[]: Re: NGE Artbook Recommendations?             Quote Post by Orgeston » Sat Jan 02, 2016 4:20 am Fantastic! Thanks for pointing me in the right direction. This is really helpful.

[]: Re: NGE Artbook Recommendations?             Quote Post by Ray » Sat Jan 02, 2016 4:37 am I just bought 'Der Mond'. and I'm looking forward to it arriving. If only I hadn't been a cheapskate and bought it full price instead of secondhand off of amazon, I'd probably have it by now.
